## [Google Pixel 10a finally launches in Japan with exclusive ‘Isai Blue’ color \[Video\]](https://9to5google.com/2026/04/06/google-pixel-10a-exclusive-blue-color-launch/)

[![Avatar for Ben Schoon](https://secure.gravatar.com/avatar/59cb0e121a572a78cfc8040731068741887591b7ef93f5498a8d93310278c0f7?s=18&d=mm&r=r)](https://9to5google.com/author/nexusben1/) [Ben Schoon](https://9to5google.com/author/nexusben1/ "Posts by Ben Schoon")10 hours ago

[1 Comment](https://9to5google.com/2026/04/06/google-pixel-10a-exclusive-blue-color-launch/?extended-comments=1#comments)

[![](https://9to5google.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/4/2026/04/pixel-10a-isai-blue-2.webp?w=1600)](https://9to5google.com/2026/04/06/google-pixel-10a-exclusive-blue-color-launch/)

The Pixel 10a launched [about a month ago](https://9to5google.com/2026/02/18/google-pixel-10a-announcement-hands-on/) in most of the world, but has been absent in Japan despite [prior success](https://9to5google.com/2024/03/06/japan-google-pixel-sales-increase-2023/) for the Pixel in that region. That’s finally changing, though, as the Pixel 10a is now available for pre-order in Japan and, on top of that, it gets a special “Isai Blue” color that’s exclusive to the region.
